name: One Way Hotel to Mauritius Airport Transfer
remarks:
- SIC Transfer timings - 8 AM to 5 PM only daily.

- Night Surcharge Supplement (For Private Transfers between 9.01PM to 7.59AM):
Sedan = 20$
Van = 30$
Bus = 40$

- For SIC transfers, rate for one-way and round-trip transfers are same.
inclusions: Airport Transfer, Meet & Greet Service, English Speaking Driver

name: Mauritius Tour Transfers - PVT
remarks:
- We can add this transfer for all kinds of tours/activities in Mauritius where private transfers are required. Applicable to those tours where only ticket rates are mentioned and no private rates are available.
- This transfer only available on PVT basis.
- If there are multiple short tours on the same day, then also this transfer can be added so that all tours can be done on private basis.
- 80km range per day limit. A surcharge might be charged for extra km.
notes: - 80km range per day limit. A surcharge might be charged for extra km.
inclusions: Full Day Car on Disposal, English Speaking Driver, 80km drive range per day
